dimensions.name: snapshot_date
dimensions.comment: Reference date of the data snapshot, representing the state of the source data at extraction time.

dimensions.name: character_id
dimensions.comment: Stable unique identifier of the character.

dimensions.name: world_id
dimensions.comment: Stable unique identifier of the Tibia world.

dimensions.name: account_status
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the character account is Free or Premium.

dimensions.name: sex
dimensions.comment: Current sex of the character on the snapshot date.

dimensions.name: vocation
dimensions.comment: Current vocation of the character on the snapshot date.

dimensions.name: level
dimensions.comment: Current level of the character on the snapshot date.

dimensions.name: level_delta_1d
dimensions.comment: Difference in character level compared to the previous day. Formula: level(D) - level(D-1).

dimensions.name: level_delta_7d
dimensions.comment: Difference in character level compared to 7 days ago. Formula: level(D) - level(D-7).

dimensions.name: level_delta_30d
dimensions.comment: Difference in character level compared to 30 days ago. Formula: level(D) - level(D-30).

dimensions.name: level_delta_90d
dimensions.comment: Difference in character level compared to 90 days ago. Formula: level(D) - level(D-90).

dimensions.name: first_seen_date
dimensions.comment: Earliest date on which the character was observed in the dataset based on ingestion history, not necessarily the character creation date.

dimensions.name: last_login_date
dimensions.comment: Most recent known login date of the character as reported by the source API at the time of ingestion.

dimensions.name: days_since_last_login
dimensions.comment: Number of days between the snapshot_date and the character last_login_date, representing inactivity duration. Formula: snapshot_date - last_login_date.

dimensions.name: is_active_1d
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the character was active within the last 1 day relative to snapshot_date.

dimensions.name: is_active_7d
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the character was active within the last 7 days relative to snapshot_date.

dimensions.name: is_active_30d
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the character was active within the last 30 days relative to snapshot_date.

dimensions.name: is_active_90d
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the character was active within the last 90 days relative to snapshot_date.

dimensions.name: lifecycle_stage
dimensions.comment: Player lifecycle classification on the snapshot date. Mutually exclusive categories: new, returning, active, dormant, churned. The classification follows a strict precedence rule to avoid overlap. A player is classified as new when first_seen_date equals snapshot_date. A player is classified as returning when active on the current day and previously classified as dormant or churned in the most recent prior observation. If neither condition applies, a player is classified as active when there is activity within the last 7 days. A player is classified as dormant when there has been no activity in the last 7 days but activity occurred within the last 30 days. A player is classified as churned when there has been no activity for more than 30 days.

dimensions.name: in_guild
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the character is currently a member of a guild.

dimensions.name: owns_house
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the character owns at least one house at the time of the snapshot.

dimensions.name: is_married
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the character is currently married in the game.

dimensions.name: loyalty_title
dimensions.comment: The loyalty title associated with the character account.

dimensions.name: achievement_points
dimensions.comment: Total number of achievement points accumulated by the character at the time of the snapshot.

dimensions.name: processed_at
dimensions.comment: Timestamp when the record was processed into the Gold layer (UTC).

measures.name: count
measures.comment: Represents the total number of rows in the dataset. Use this measure to count all

measures.name: count
measures.comment: Represents the total number of rows in the dataset. Use this measure to count all

dimensions.name: granularity
dimensions.comment: Temporal aggregation level used to define cohorts and retention windows. Supported values include Day, Week, Month, and Quarter.

dimensions.name: cohort_period
dimensions.comment: Start date of the cohort period in which the player first qualified for inclusion in the cohort.

dimensions.name: cohort_period_status
dimensions.comment: Data completeness status of the cohort period. Supported values include full, partial_start, partial_current, and partial_missing.

dimensions.name: cohort_is_partial_period
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the cohort period has incomplete snapshot coverage relative to the expected number of days for the selected granularity.

dimensions.name: observation_period
dimensions.comment: Start date of the observation period used to measure retention for the cohort.

dimensions.name: observation_period_status
dimensions.comment: Data completeness status of the observation period. Supported values include full, partial_start, partial_current, and partial_missing.

dimensions.name: observation_is_partial_period
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the observation period has incomplete snapshot coverage relative to the expected number of days for the selected granularity.

dimensions.name: periods_elapsed
dimensions.comment: Number of elapsed periods between the cohort_period and the observation_period according to the selected granularity. Example: for Month granularity, value 1 represents the first month after cohort acquisition.

dimensions.name: world_id
dimensions.comment: Stable unique identifier of the Tibia world associated with the player during the observation period.

dimensions.name: account_status
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the player account was Free or Premium during the observation period.

dimensions.name: sex
dimensions.comment: Current sex of the character during the observation period.

dimensions.name: vocation
dimensions.comment: Normalized vocation category of the character during the observation period. Promotions are grouped into their base vocation categories.

dimensions.name: in_guild
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the character belonged to a guild during the observation period.

dimensions.name: owns_house
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the character owned at least one house during the observation period.

dimensions.name: is_married
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the character was married during the observation period.

dimensions.name: loyalty_title
dimensions.comment: Loyalty title associated with the character account during the observation period.

dimensions.name: cohort_size
dimensions.comment: Total number of distinct characters included in the original cohort for the specified segmentation dimensions.

dimensions.name: retained_count
dimensions.comment: Number of distinct cohort characters that remained active in the corresponding observation_period.

dimensions.name: retention_rate
dimensions.comment: Retention ratio calculated as retained_count divided by cohort_size. Formula: retained_count / cohort_size.

dimensions.name: processed_at
dimensions.comment: Timestamp when the record was processed into the Gold layer (UTC).

measures.name: count
measures.comment: Represents the total number of rows in the dataset. Use this measure to count all

dimensions.name: world_id
dimensions.comment: World unique identifier.

dimensions.name: world_name
dimensions.comment: The name of the world.

dimensions.name: location
dimensions.comment: The physical location of the servers. Possible values: Europe, North America, Oceania, South America.

dimensions.name: pvp_type
dimensions.comment: The type of PvP. Possible values: Hardcore PvP, Open PvP, Optional PvP, Retro Hardcore PvP, Retro Open PvP.

dimensions.name: premium_only
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether only premium account players are allowed to play on the world.

dimensions.name: transfer_type
dimensions.comment: The type of transfer restriction applied to the world. Possible values: Blocked, Locked, Regular.

dimensions.name: battleye_protected
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the world is protected by BattlEye. TRUE if protected, FALSE otherwise.

dimensions.name: battleye_date
dimensions.comment: The date when BattlEye was added. If battleye_protected is TRUE, NULL indicates protection since world launch.

dimensions.name: world_type
dimensions.comment: The game world category. Possible values: Experimental, Regular, Tournament.

dimensions.name: tournament_type
dimensions.comment: The tournament world category. Possible values: Default, Regular, Restricted.

dimensions.name: first_seen_date
dimensions.comment: The earliest date on which the world appeared in the collected data, representing its first observed presence in the dataset.

dimensions.name: last_seen_date
dimensions.comment: The most recent date on which the world appeared in the collected data, representing its latest observed presence in the dataset.

dimensions.name: is_active
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the world is active. TRUE if active, FALSE otherwise.

dimensions.name: created_at
dimensions.comment: World creation timestamp (UTC).

dimensions.name: updated_at
dimensions.comment: Gold layer processing timestamp (UTC).

measures.name: count
measures.comment: Represents the total number of rows in the dataset. Use this measure to count all

dimensions.name: date_key
dimensions.comment: Unique identifier for the calendar date in YYYYMMDD format.

dimensions.name: year_key
dimensions.comment: Calendar year identifier.

dimensions.name: quarter_key
dimensions.comment: Calendar quarter identifier in YYYYQQ format.

dimensions.name: month_key
dimensions.comment: Calendar month identifier in YYYYMM format.

dimensions.name: week_key
dimensions.comment: Calendar week identifier based on week start date.

dimensions.name: full_date
dimensions.comment: Calendar date.

dimensions.name: year
dimensions.comment: Calendar year.

dimensions.name: quarter
dimensions.comment: Calendar quarter number (1-4).

dimensions.name: quarter_name
dimensions.comment: Quarter label (Q1-Q4).

dimensions.name: quarter_year
dimensions.comment: Quarter and year label.

dimensions.name: quarter_start_date
dimensions.comment: First day of the quarter.

dimensions.name: quarter_end_date
dimensions.comment: Last day of the quarter.

dimensions.name: month
dimensions.comment: Calendar month number (1-12).

dimensions.name: month_name
dimensions.comment: Full month name.

dimensions.name: month_short_name
dimensions.comment: Abbreviated month name.

dimensions.name: month_year_short
dimensions.comment: Short month and year label.

dimensions.name: month_start_date
dimensions.comment: First day of the month.

dimensions.name: month_end_date
dimensions.comment: Last day of the month.

dimensions.name: days_in_month
dimensions.comment: Number of days in the month.

dimensions.name: iso_week
dimensions.comment: ISO week number.

dimensions.name: iso_year
dimensions.comment: ISO week-based year.

dimensions.name: iso_year_week
dimensions.comment: ISO year-week identifier.

dimensions.name: week_start_date
dimensions.comment: First day of the week.

dimensions.name: week_end_date
dimensions.comment: Last day of the week.

dimensions.name: day
dimensions.comment: Day of month.

dimensions.name: day_of_year
dimensions.comment: Day number within the year.

dimensions.name: day_of_week_iso
dimensions.comment: ISO day of week where Monday=1 and Sunday=7.

dimensions.name: day_name
dimensions.comment: Full weekday name.

dimensions.name: day_short_name
dimensions.comment: Abbreviated weekday name.

dimensions.name: is_first_day_of_month
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the date is the first day of the month.

dimensions.name: is_last_day_of_month
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the date is the last day of the month.

dimensions.name: is_weekday
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the date falls on a weekday.

dimensions.name: is_weekend
dimensions.comment: Indicates whether the date falls on a weekend.

dimensions.name: processed_at
dimensions.comment: Timestamp when the record was processed into the Utils layer (UTC).

measures.name: count
measures.comment: Represents the total number of rows in the dataset. Use this measure to count all

datasets.name: c542b912
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT period_start,
         period_end,
         period_status,
         character_id,
         world_id,
         account_status,
         sex,
         vocation,
         is_active_7d,
         is_active_30d,
         LAG(is_active_7d) OVER (PARTITION BY character_id, granularity ORDER BY period_start) AS prev_is_active_7d,
         lifecycle_stage,
         lifecycle_event,
         in_guild,
         owns_house,
         is_married,
         loyalty_title
    FROM tibia_analytics.gold.characters_behavior_periodic
   WHERE granularity = 'Week'
),
filtered AS (
  SELECT base.period_start,
         base.period_end,
         base.character_id,
         base.is_active_7d,
         base.is_active_30d,
         base.prev_is_active_7d,
         base.lifecycle_stage,
         base.lifecycle_event
    FROM base AS base
   INNER JOIN tibia_analytics.gold.worlds AS worlds
      ON worlds.world_id = base.world_id
   WHERE base.period_start BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
     AND base.period_status != 'partial_start'
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, worlds.world_name))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, worlds.location))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, worlds.pvp_type))
     AND (:p_premium_only = 'All'
           OR (:p_premium_only = 'Yes' AND worlds.premium_only = TRUE)
           OR (:p_premium_only = 'No'  AND worlds.premium_only = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, worlds.transfer_type))
     AND (:p_battleye_protected = 'All'
           OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'Yes' AND worlds.battleye_protected = TRUE)
           OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'No'  AND worlds.battleye_protected = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, worlds.world_type))
     AND (:p_is_active = 'All'
           OR (:p_is_active  = 'Yes' AND worlds.is_active = TRUE)
           OR (:p_is_active  = 'No'  AND worlds.is_active = FALSE))
     AND (:p_account_status  = 'All'
           OR :p_account_status = base.account_status)
     AND (:p_sex = 'All'
           OR :p_sex = base.sex)
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, base.vocation))
     AND (:p_in_guild = 'All'
           OR (:p_in_guild   = 'Yes' AND base.in_guild    = TRUE)
           OR (:p_in_guild   = 'No'  AND base.in_guild    = FALSE))
     AND (:p_owns_house = 'All'
           OR (:p_owns_house = 'Yes' AND base.owns_house  = TRUE)
           OR (:p_owns_house = 'No'  AND base.owns_house  = FALSE))
     AND (:p_is_married = 'All'
           OR (:p_is_married = 'Yes' AND base.is_married  = TRUE)
           OR (:p_is_married = 'No'  AND base.is_married  = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, base.loyalty_title))
),
period_agg AS (
  SELECT period_start,
         period_end,
         COUNT(DISTINCT character_id) AS observed_total,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_stage = 'new'              THEN character_id END) AS characters_new,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_stage = 'returning'        THEN character_id END) AS characters_returning,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_stage = 'active'           THEN character_id END) AS characters_active,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_stage = 'dormant'          THEN character_id END) AS characters_dormant,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_stage = 'churned'          THEN character_id END) AS characters_churned,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_event = 'new'              THEN character_id END) AS ev_new,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_event = 'returning'        THEN character_id END) AS ev_returning,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_event = 'dormant'          THEN character_id END) AS ev_dormant,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_event = 'churned'          THEN character_id END) AS ev_churned,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_active_30d                        THEN character_id END) AS active_30d,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_active_7d AND prev_is_active_7d   THEN character_id END) AS retained_7d,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN prev_is_active_7d                    THEN character_id END) AS prev_active_7d
    FROM filtered
   GROUP BY period_start,
            period_end
)
SELECT period_start,
       period_end,
       observed_total,
       ROUND(characters_new       / observed_total, 6)                           AS new_character_rate,
       ROUND(characters_returning / observed_total, 6)                           AS returning_character_rate,
       ROUND(characters_active    / observed_total, 6)                           AS active_character_rate,
       ROUND(characters_dormant   / observed_total, 6)                           AS dormant_character_rate,
       ROUND(characters_churned   / observed_total, 6)                           AS churned_character_rate,
       ROUND(active_30d / observed_total, 6)                                     AS activity_rate_30d,
       ROUND(retained_7d / NULLIF(prev_active_7d, 0), 6)                         AS retention_rate_7d,
       (ev_new + ev_returning)                                                   AS inflow,
       -ev_churned                                                               AS outflow,
       (ev_new + ev_returning - ev_churned)                                      AS net_character_growth,
       ROUND((ev_new + ev_returning) / observed_total, 6)                        AS inflow_rate,
       ROUND(-ev_churned / observed_total, 6)                                    AS outflow_rate,
       ROUND((ev_new + ev_returning - ev_churned) / observed_total, 6)           AS growth_rate,
       ROUND((ev_new + ev_returning) / NULLIF(ev_churned, 0), 6)                 AS replacement_rate
  FROM period_agg
 ORDER BY period_start DESC;

datasets.name: a871f39b
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT period_start,
         period_end,
         period_status,
         character_id,
         world_id,
         account_status,
         sex,
         vocation,
         lifecycle_stage,
         lifecycle_event,
         in_guild,
         owns_house,
         is_married,
         loyalty_title
    FROM tibia_analytics.gold.characters_behavior_periodic
   WHERE granularity = 'Week'
),
filtered AS (
  SELECT base.period_start,
         base.period_end,
         base.character_id,
         base.lifecycle_stage,
         base.lifecycle_event
    FROM base AS base
   INNER JOIN tibia_analytics.gold.worlds AS worlds
      ON worlds.world_id = base.world_id
   WHERE base.period_start BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
     AND base.period_status != 'partial_start'
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, worlds.world_name))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, worlds.location))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, worlds.pvp_type))
     AND (:p_premium_only = 'All'
           OR (:p_premium_only = 'Yes' AND worlds.premium_only = TRUE)
           OR (:p_premium_only = 'No'  AND worlds.premium_only = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, worlds.transfer_type))
     AND (:p_battleye_protected = 'All'
           OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'Yes' AND worlds.battleye_protected = TRUE)
           OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'No'  AND worlds.battleye_protected = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, worlds.world_type))
     AND (:p_is_active = 'All'
           OR (:p_is_active  = 'Yes' AND worlds.is_active = TRUE)
           OR (:p_is_active  = 'No'  AND worlds.is_active = FALSE))
     AND (:p_account_status  = 'All'
           OR :p_account_status = base.account_status)
     AND (:p_sex = 'All'
           OR :p_sex = base.sex)
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, base.vocation))
     AND (:p_in_guild = 'All'
           OR (:p_in_guild   = 'Yes' AND base.in_guild    = TRUE)
           OR (:p_in_guild   = 'No'  AND base.in_guild    = FALSE))
     AND (:p_owns_house = 'All'
           OR (:p_owns_house = 'Yes' AND base.owns_house  = TRUE)
           OR (:p_owns_house = 'No'  AND base.owns_house  = FALSE))
     AND (:p_is_married = 'All'
           OR (:p_is_married = 'Yes' AND base.is_married  = TRUE)
           OR (:p_is_married = 'No'  AND base.is_married  = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, base.loyalty_title))
),
period_agg AS (
  SELECT period_start,
         period_end,
         COUNT(DISTINCT character_id)                                                         AS observed_total,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_stage = 'new'              THEN character_id END) AS characters_new,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_stage = 'returning'        THEN character_id END) AS characters_returning,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_stage = 'active'           THEN character_id END) AS characters_active,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_stage = 'dormant'          THEN character_id END) AS characters_dormant,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_stage = 'churned'          THEN character_id END) AS characters_churned,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_event = 'new'              THEN character_id END) AS ev_new,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_event = 'returning'        THEN character_id END) AS ev_returning,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_event = 'dormant'          THEN character_id END) AS ev_dormant,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_event = 'churned'          THEN character_id END) AS ev_churned
    FROM filtered
   GROUP BY period_start,
            period_end
)
SELECT period_start,
       period_end,
       observed_total,
       characters_new,
       characters_returning,
       characters_active,
       characters_dormant,
       characters_churned,
       ROUND(characters_new       / observed_total, 6)                           AS new_character_rate,
       ROUND(characters_returning / observed_total, 6)                           AS returning_character_rate,
       ROUND(characters_active    / observed_total, 6)                           AS active_character_rate,
       ROUND(characters_dormant   / observed_total, 6)                           AS dormant_character_rate,
       ROUND(characters_churned   / observed_total, 6)                           AS churned_character_rate,
       ev_new, 
       ev_returning, 
       ev_dormant, 
       ev_churned,
       ROUND(ev_new       / observed_total, 6)                                   AS new_event_rate,
       ROUND(ev_returning / observed_total, 6)                                   AS returning_event_rate,
       ROUND(ev_dormant   / observed_total, 6)                                   AS dormant_event_rate,
       ROUND(ev_churned   / observed_total, 6)                                   AS churned_event_rate,
       (ev_new + ev_returning)                                                   AS inflow,
       -ev_churned                                                               AS outflow,
       (ev_new + ev_returning - ev_churned)                                      AS net_character_growth,
       ROUND((ev_new + ev_returning) / observed_total, 6)                        AS inflow_rate,
       ROUND(-ev_churned / observed_total, 6)                                    AS outflow_rate,
       ROUND((ev_new + ev_returning - ev_churned) / observed_total, 6)           AS growth_rate,
       ROUND((ev_new + ev_returning) / NULLIF(CAST(ev_churned AS DOUBLE), 0), 6) AS replacement_rate,
       ROUND(ev_new / NULLIF(ev_new + ev_returning, 0), 6)                       AS acquisition_ratio,
       ROUND(ev_returning / NULLIF(ev_new + ev_returning, 0), 6)                 AS reactivation_ratio
  FROM period_agg
 ORDER BY period_start DESC;

datasets.name: f23c4b74
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT period_start,
         period_end,
         period_days,
         observed_days,
         is_partial_period,
         period_status,
         character_id,
         world_id,
         account_status,
         sex,
         vocation,
         level,
         level_delta_period,
         level_delta_short,
         level_delta_medium,
         level_delta_long,
         level_delta_xlong,
         is_active_in_period,
         is_active_1d,
         is_active_7d,
         is_active_30d,
         is_active_90d,
         in_guild,
         owns_house,
         is_married,
         loyalty_title,
         achievement_points
    FROM tibia_analytics.gold.characters_behavior_periodic
   WHERE granularity = 'Week'
),
filtered AS (
  SELECT base.period_start,
         base.period_end,
         base.period_days,
         base.observed_days,
         base.is_partial_period,
         base.period_status,
         base.character_id,
         base.level,
         base.level_delta_period,
         base.level_delta_short,
         base.level_delta_medium,
         base.level_delta_long,
         base.level_delta_xlong,
         base.is_active_in_period,
         base.is_active_1d,
         base.is_active_7d,
         base.is_active_30d,
         base.is_active_90d,
         base.achievement_points
    FROM base AS base
   INNER JOIN tibia_analytics.gold.worlds AS worlds
      ON worlds.world_id = base.world_id
   WHERE base.period_start BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
     AND base.period_status != 'partial_start'
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, worlds.world_name))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, worlds.location))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, worlds.pvp_type))
     AND (:p_premium_only = 'All'
           OR (:p_premium_only = 'Yes' AND worlds.premium_only = TRUE)
           OR (:p_premium_only = 'No'  AND worlds.premium_only = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, worlds.transfer_type))
     AND (:p_battleye_protected = 'All'
           OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'Yes' AND worlds.battleye_protected = TRUE)
           OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'No'  AND worlds.battleye_protected = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, worlds.world_type))
     AND (:p_is_active = 'All'
           OR (:p_is_active  = 'Yes' AND worlds.is_active = TRUE)
           OR (:p_is_active  = 'No'  AND worlds.is_active = FALSE))
     AND (:p_account_status  = 'All'
           OR :p_account_status = base.account_status)
     AND (:p_sex = 'All'
           OR :p_sex = base.sex)
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, base.vocation))
     AND (:p_in_guild = 'All'
           OR (:p_in_guild   = 'Yes' AND base.in_guild    = TRUE)
           OR (:p_in_guild   = 'No'  AND base.in_guild    = FALSE))
     AND (:p_owns_house = 'All'
           OR (:p_owns_house = 'Yes' AND base.owns_house  = TRUE)
           OR (:p_owns_house = 'No'  AND base.owns_house  = FALSE))
     AND (:p_is_married = 'All'
           OR (:p_is_married = 'Yes' AND base.is_married  = TRUE)
           OR (:p_is_married = 'No'  AND base.is_married  = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, base.loyalty_title))
),
period_agg AS (
  SELECT period_start,
         period_end,
         period_days,
         observed_days,
         is_partial_period,
         period_status,
         COUNT(DISTINCT character_id)                                                  AS observed_total,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_active_in_period     THEN character_id END)       AS active_characters,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_active_1d            THEN character_id END)       AS active_1d,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_active_7d            THEN character_id END)       AS active_7d,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_active_30d           THEN character_id END)       AS active_30d,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_active_90d           THEN character_id END)       AS active_90d,
         ROUND(AVG(level), 6)                                                          AS avg_level_all,
         ROUND(AVG(level_delta_period), 6)                                             AS avg_level_progression_all,
         ROUND(AVG(level_delta_short), 6)                                              AS avg_level_progression_short_all,
         ROUND(AVG(level_delta_medium), 6)                                             AS avg_level_progression_medium_all,
         ROUND(AVG(level_delta_long), 6)                                               AS avg_level_progression_long_all,
         ROUND(AVG(level_delta_xlong), 6)                                              AS avg_level_progression_xlong_all,
         ROUND(AVG(achievement_points), 6)                                             AS avg_achievement_points_all,
         ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN is_active_in_period      THEN level END), 6)              AS avg_level_active,
         ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN is_active_in_period      THEN level_delta_period END), 6) AS avg_level_progression_active,
         ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN is_active_in_period      THEN level_delta_short  END), 6) AS avg_level_progression_short_active,
         ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN is_active_in_period      THEN level_delta_medium END), 6) AS avg_level_progression_medium_active,
         ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN is_active_in_period      THEN level_delta_long   END), 6) AS avg_level_progression_long_active,
         ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN is_active_in_period      THEN level_delta_xlong  END), 6) AS avg_level_progression_xlong_active,
         ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN is_active_in_period      THEN achievement_points END), 6) AS avg_achievement_points_active
    FROM filtered
   GROUP BY period_start,
            period_end,
            period_days,
            observed_days,
            is_partial_period,
            period_status
)
SELECT period_start,
       period_end,
       period_days,
       observed_days,
       is_partial_period,
       period_status,
       observed_total,
       active_characters,
       ROUND(active_characters / observed_total, 6)     AS period_activity_rate,
       ROUND(active_1d      / observed_total, 6)        AS activity_rate_1d,
       ROUND(active_7d      / observed_total, 6)        AS activity_rate_7d,
       ROUND(active_30d     / observed_total, 6)        AS activity_rate_30d,
       ROUND(active_90d     / observed_total, 6)        AS activity_rate_90d,
       ROUND(active_1d      / NULLIF(active_30d, 0), 6) AS stickiness_dau_mau,
       ROUND(active_7d      / NULLIF(active_30d, 0), 6) AS stickiness_wau_mau,
       avg_level_all,
       avg_level_progression_all,
       avg_level_progression_short_all,
       avg_level_progression_medium_all,
       avg_level_progression_long_all,
       avg_level_progression_xlong_all,
       avg_achievement_points_all,
       avg_level_active,
       avg_level_progression_active,
       avg_level_progression_short_active,
       avg_level_progression_medium_active,
       avg_level_progression_long_active,
       avg_level_progression_xlong_active,
       avg_achievement_points_active
  FROM period_agg
 ORDER BY period_start DESC;

datasets.name: 6c27d41a
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT period_start,
         period_status,
         character_id,
         world_id,
         account_status,
         sex,
         vocation,
         in_guild,
         owns_house,
         is_married,
         loyalty_title
    FROM tibia_analytics.gold.characters_behavior_periodic
   WHERE granularity = 'Week'
),
filtered AS (
  SELECT base.period_start,
         base.character_id,
         base.loyalty_title
    FROM base AS base
   INNER JOIN tibia_analytics.gold.worlds AS worlds
      ON worlds.world_id = base.world_id
   WHERE base.period_start BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
     AND base.period_status != 'partial_start'
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, worlds.world_name))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, worlds.location))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, worlds.pvp_type))
     AND (:p_premium_only = 'All'
           OR (:p_premium_only = 'Yes' AND worlds.premium_only = TRUE)
           OR (:p_premium_only = 'No'  AND worlds.premium_only = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, worlds.transfer_type))
     AND (:p_battleye_protected = 'All'
           OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'Yes' AND worlds.battleye_protected = TRUE)
           OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'No'  AND worlds.battleye_protected = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, worlds.world_type))
     AND (:p_is_active = 'All'
           OR (:p_is_active  = 'Yes' AND worlds.is_active = TRUE)
           OR (:p_is_active  = 'No'  AND worlds.is_active = FALSE))
     AND (:p_account_status  = 'All'
           OR :p_account_status = base.account_status)
     AND (:p_sex = 'All'
           OR :p_sex = base.sex)
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, base.vocation))
     AND (:p_in_guild = 'All'
           OR (:p_in_guild   = 'Yes' AND base.in_guild    = TRUE)
           OR (:p_in_guild   = 'No'  AND base.in_guild    = FALSE))
     AND (:p_owns_house = 'All'
           OR (:p_owns_house = 'Yes' AND base.owns_house  = TRUE)
           OR (:p_owns_house = 'No'  AND base.owns_house  = FALSE))
     AND (:p_is_married = 'All'
           OR (:p_is_married = 'Yes' AND base.is_married  = TRUE)
           OR (:p_is_married = 'No'  AND base.is_married  = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, base.loyalty_title))
)
SELECT period_start,
       loyalty_title,
       COUNT(DISTINCT character_id) AS characters
  FROM filtered
 GROUP BY period_start, 
          loyalty_title
 ORDER BY period_start DESC;

datasets.name: 8da057bf
queryLines:
SELECT cr.cohort_period,
       cr.periods_elapsed,
       SUM(cr.cohort_size)                                               AS cohort_size,
       SUM(cr.retained_count)                                            AS retained_count,
       ROUND(SUM(cr.retained_count) / NULLIF(SUM(cr.cohort_size), 0), 4) AS retention_rate
  FROM tibia_analytics.gold.cohort_retention AS cr
 INNER JOIN tibia_analytics.gold.worlds      AS worlds
    ON worlds.world_id = cr.world_id
 WHERE cr.granularity          = 'Month'
   AND cr.cohort_period BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
   AND cr.cohort_period_status IN ('complete', 'partial_missing')
   AND cr.observation_period_status IN ('complete', 'partial_missing')
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, worlds.world_name))
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, worlds.location))
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, worlds.pvp_type))
   AND (:p_premium_only = 'All'
         OR (:p_premium_only = 'Yes' AND worlds.premium_only = TRUE)
         OR (:p_premium_only = 'No'  AND worlds.premium_only = FALSE))
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, worlds.transfer_type))
   AND (:p_battleye_protected = 'All'
         OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'Yes' AND worlds.battleye_protected = TRUE)
         OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'No'  AND worlds.battleye_protected = FALSE))
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, worlds.world_type))
   AND (:p_is_active = 'All'
         OR (:p_is_active  = 'Yes' AND worlds.is_active = TRUE)
         OR (:p_is_active  = 'No'  AND worlds.is_active = FALSE))
   AND (:p_account_status  = 'All'
         OR :p_account_status = cr.account_status)
   AND (:p_sex = 'All'
         OR :p_sex = cr.sex)
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, cr.vocation))
   AND (:p_in_guild = 'All'
         OR (:p_in_guild   = 'Yes' AND cr.in_guild    = TRUE)
         OR (:p_in_guild   = 'No'  AND cr.in_guild    = FALSE))
   AND (:p_owns_house = 'All'
         OR (:p_owns_house = 'Yes' AND cr.owns_house  = TRUE)
         OR (:p_owns_house = 'No'  AND cr.owns_house  = FALSE))
   AND (:p_is_married = 'All'
         OR (:p_is_married = 'Yes' AND cr.is_married  = TRUE)
         OR (:p_is_married = 'No'  AND cr.is_married  = FALSE))
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, cr.loyalty_title))
 GROUP BY cr.cohort_period, 
          cr.periods_elapsed
 ORDER BY cr.cohort_period, 
          cr.periods_elapsed

columns.description: Percentage of cohort that remained active in each period

datasets.name: 394ae852
queryLines:
SELECT cr.periods_elapsed,
       CASE :p_cohort_dimension
         WHEN 'account_status' THEN cr.account_status
         WHEN 'vocation'       THEN cr.vocation
         WHEN 'world'          THEN worlds.world_name
         WHEN 'in_guild'       THEN CASE WHEN cr.in_guild   THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END
         WHEN 'owns_house'     THEN CASE WHEN cr.owns_house THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END
         WHEN 'is_married'     THEN CASE WHEN cr.is_married THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END
         ELSE 'All'
       END                                                               AS cohort_dimension,
       SUM(cr.cohort_size)                                               AS cohort_size,
       SUM(cr.retained_count)                                            AS retained_count,
       ROUND(SUM(cr.retained_count) / NULLIF(SUM(cr.cohort_size), 0), 4) AS retention_rate
  FROM tibia_analytics.gold.cohort_retention AS cr
 INNER JOIN tibia_analytics.gold.worlds AS worlds
    ON worlds.world_id = cr.world_id
 WHERE cr.granularity          = 'Month'
   AND cr.cohort_period BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
   AND cr.cohort_period_status IN ('complete', 'partial_missing')
   AND cr.observation_period_status IN ('complete', 'partial_missing')
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, worlds.world_name))
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, worlds.location))
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, worlds.pvp_type))
   AND (:p_premium_only = 'All'
         OR (:p_premium_only = 'Yes' AND worlds.premium_only = TRUE)
         OR (:p_premium_only = 'No'  AND worlds.premium_only = FALSE))
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, worlds.transfer_type))
   AND (:p_battleye_protected = 'All'
         OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'Yes' AND worlds.battleye_protected = TRUE)
         OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'No'  AND worlds.battleye_protected = FALSE))
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, worlds.world_type))
   AND (:p_is_active = 'All'
         OR (:p_is_active  = 'Yes' AND worlds.is_active = TRUE)
         OR (:p_is_active  = 'No'  AND worlds.is_active = FALSE))
   AND (:p_account_status  = 'All'
         OR :p_account_status = cr.account_status)
   AND (:p_sex = 'All'
         OR :p_sex = cr.sex)
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, cr.vocation))
   AND (:p_in_guild = 'All'
         OR (:p_in_guild   = 'Yes' AND cr.in_guild    = TRUE)
         OR (:p_in_guild   = 'No'  AND cr.in_guild    = FALSE))
   AND (:p_owns_house = 'All'
         OR (:p_owns_house = 'Yes' AND cr.owns_house  = TRUE)
         OR (:p_owns_house = 'No'  AND cr.owns_house  = FALSE))
   AND (:p_is_married = 'All'
         OR (:p_is_married = 'Yes' AND cr.is_married  = TRUE)
         OR (:p_is_married = 'No'  AND cr.is_married  = FALSE))
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, cr.loyalty_title))
 GROUP BY cr.periods_elapsed, 
          cohort_dimension
 ORDER BY cr.periods_elapsed, 
          cohort_dimension

datasets.name: 9e051a46
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT period_start,
         period_end,
         period_status,
         character_id,
         world_id,
         account_status,
         sex,
         vocation,
         is_active_30d,
         is_active_90d,
         LAG(is_active_30d) OVER (PARTITION BY character_id, granularity ORDER BY period_start) AS prev_is_active_30d,
         LAG(is_active_90d) OVER (PARTITION BY character_id, granularity ORDER BY period_start) AS prev_is_active_90d,
         in_guild,
         owns_house,
         is_married,
         loyalty_title
    FROM tibia_analytics.gold.characters_behavior_periodic
   WHERE granularity = 'Month'
),
filtered AS (
  SELECT base.period_start,
         base.period_end,
         base.character_id,
         base.is_active_30d,
         base.is_active_90d,
         base.prev_is_active_30d,
         base.prev_is_active_90d
    FROM base AS base
   INNER JOIN tibia_analytics.gold.worlds AS worlds
      ON worlds.world_id = base.world_id
   WHERE base.period_start BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
     AND base.period_status != 'partial_start'
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, worlds.world_name))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, worlds.location))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, worlds.pvp_type))
     AND (:p_premium_only = 'All'
           OR (:p_premium_only = 'Yes' AND worlds.premium_only = TRUE)
           OR (:p_premium_only = 'No'  AND worlds.premium_only = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, worlds.transfer_type))
     AND (:p_battleye_protected = 'All'
           OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'Yes' AND worlds.battleye_protected = TRUE)
           OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'No'  AND worlds.battleye_protected = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, worlds.world_type))
     AND (:p_is_active = 'All'
           OR (:p_is_active  = 'Yes' AND worlds.is_active = TRUE)
           OR (:p_is_active  = 'No'  AND worlds.is_active = FALSE))
     AND (:p_account_status  = 'All'
           OR :p_account_status = base.account_status)
     AND (:p_sex = 'All'
           OR :p_sex = base.sex)
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, base.vocation))
     AND (:p_in_guild = 'All'
           OR (:p_in_guild   = 'Yes' AND base.in_guild    = TRUE)
           OR (:p_in_guild   = 'No'  AND base.in_guild    = FALSE))
     AND (:p_owns_house = 'All'
           OR (:p_owns_house = 'Yes' AND base.owns_house  = TRUE)
           OR (:p_owns_house = 'No'  AND base.owns_house  = FALSE))
     AND (:p_is_married = 'All'
           OR (:p_is_married = 'Yes' AND base.is_married  = TRUE)
           OR (:p_is_married = 'No'  AND base.is_married  = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, base.loyalty_title))
),
period_agg AS (
  SELECT period_start,
         period_end,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_active_30d AND prev_is_active_30d THEN character_id END) AS retained_30d,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN prev_is_active_30d                   THEN character_id END) AS prev_active_30d,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_active_90d AND prev_is_active_90d THEN character_id END) AS retained_90d,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN prev_is_active_90d                   THEN character_id END) AS prev_active_90d
    FROM filtered
   GROUP BY period_start,
            period_end
)
SELECT period_start,
       period_end,
       retained_30d,
       ROUND(retained_30d / NULLIF(prev_active_30d, 0), 6)       AS retention_rate_30d,
       ROUND(1 - (retained_30d / NULLIF(prev_active_30d, 0)), 6) AS churn_rate_30d,
       retained_90d,
       ROUND(retained_90d / NULLIF(prev_active_90d, 0), 6)       AS retention_rate_90d,
       ROUND(1 - (retained_90d / NULLIF(prev_active_90d, 0)), 6) AS churn_rate_90d
  FROM period_agg
 ORDER BY period_start DESC;

datasets.name: d3918c8b
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT period_start,
         period_end,
         period_status,
         character_id,
         world_id,
         account_status,
         sex,
         vocation,
         is_active_90d,
         LAG(is_active_90d) OVER (PARTITION BY character_id, granularity ORDER BY period_start) AS prev_is_active_90d,
         lifecycle_event,
         in_guild,
         owns_house,
         is_married,
         loyalty_title
    FROM tibia_analytics.gold.characters_behavior_periodic
   WHERE granularity = 'Quarter'
),
filtered AS (
  SELECT base.period_start,
         base.period_end,
         base.character_id,
         base.is_active_90d,
         base.prev_is_active_90d,
         base.lifecycle_event
    FROM base AS base
   INNER JOIN tibia_analytics.gold.worlds AS worlds
      ON worlds.world_id = base.world_id
   WHERE base.period_start BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
     AND base.period_status != 'partial_start'
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, worlds.world_name))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_location, worlds.location))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_pvp_type, worlds.pvp_type))
     AND (:p_premium_only = 'All'
           OR (:p_premium_only = 'Yes' AND worlds.premium_only = TRUE)
           OR (:p_premium_only = 'No'  AND worlds.premium_only = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_transfer_type, worlds.transfer_type))
     AND (:p_battleye_protected = 'All'
           OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'Yes' AND worlds.battleye_protected = TRUE)
           OR (:p_battleye_protected = 'No'  AND worlds.battleye_protected = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_type, worlds.world_type))
     AND (:p_is_active = 'All'
           OR (:p_is_active  = 'Yes' AND worlds.is_active = TRUE)
           OR (:p_is_active  = 'No'  AND worlds.is_active = FALSE))
     AND (:p_account_status  = 'All'
           OR :p_account_status = base.account_status)
     AND (:p_sex = 'All'
           OR :p_sex = base.sex)
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_vocation, base.vocation))
     AND (:p_in_guild = 'All'
           OR (:p_in_guild   = 'Yes' AND base.in_guild    = TRUE)
           OR (:p_in_guild   = 'No'  AND base.in_guild    = FALSE))
     AND (:p_owns_house = 'All'
           OR (:p_owns_house = 'Yes' AND base.owns_house  = TRUE)
           OR (:p_owns_house = 'No'  AND base.owns_house  = FALSE))
     AND (:p_is_married = 'All'
           OR (:p_is_married = 'Yes' AND base.is_married  = TRUE)
           OR (:p_is_married = 'No'  AND base.is_married  = FALSE))
     AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, 'All')
           OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_loyalty_title, base.loyalty_title))
),
period_agg AS (
  SELECT period_start,
         period_end,
         COUNT(DISTINCT character_id) AS observed_total,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_event = 'new'              THEN character_id END) AS ev_new,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_event = 'returning'        THEN character_id END) AS ev_returning,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_event = 'dormant'          THEN character_id END) AS ev_dormant,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lifecycle_event = 'churned'          THEN character_id END) AS ev_churned,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_active_90d                        THEN character_id END) AS active_90d,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_active_90d AND prev_is_active_90d THEN character_id END) AS retained_90d,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN prev_is_active_90d                   THEN character_id END) AS prev_active_90d
    FROM filtered
   GROUP BY period_start,
            period_end
)
SELECT period_start,
       period_end,
       observed_total,
       ROUND(active_90d / observed_total, 6)                                     AS activity_rate_90d,
       retained_90d,
       ROUND(retained_90d / NULLIF(prev_active_90d, 0), 6)                       AS retention_rate_90d,
       ROUND(1 - (retained_90d / NULLIF(prev_active_90d, 0)), 6)                 AS churn_rate_90d,
       (ev_new + ev_returning)                                                   AS inflow,
       -ev_churned                                                               AS outflow,
       (ev_new + ev_returning - ev_churned)                                      AS net_character_growth,
       ROUND((ev_new + ev_returning) / observed_total, 6)                        AS inflow_rate,
       ROUND(-ev_churned / observed_total, 6)                                    AS outflow_rate,
       ROUND((ev_new + ev_returning - ev_churned) / observed_total, 6)           AS growth_rate,
       ROUND((ev_new + ev_returning) / NULLIF(ev_churned, 0), 6)                 AS replacement_rate
  FROM period_agg
 ORDER BY period_start DESC

datasets.name: 436ec528
queryLines:
WITH expected_periods AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
         CAST(
           CASE
             WHEN :p_granularity = 'Quarter' THEN DATE_TRUNC('quarter', full_date)
             WHEN :p_granularity = 'Month'   THEN DATE_TRUNC('month', full_date)
             WHEN :p_granularity = 'Week'    THEN DATE_TRUNC('week', full_date)
             ELSE full_date
           END
         AS DATE) AS period_start
    FROM tibia_analytics.utils.calendar
   WHERE full_date BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
),
base AS (
  SELECT period_start,
         MAX(period_end)              AS period_end,
         MAX(period_days)             AS period_days,
         MAX(observed_days)           AS observed_days,
         MAX(period_status)           AS period_status,
         MAX(processed_at)            AS processed_at,
         COUNT(DISTINCT character_id) AS total_characters
    FROM tibia_analytics.gold.characters_behavior_periodic
   WHERE granularity = :p_granularity
     AND period_start BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
   GROUP BY period_start
)
SELECT ep.period_start,
       COALESCE(ROUND(b.observed_days * 1.0 / NULLIF(b.period_days, 0), 4), 0) AS coverage_ratio,
       SUM(CASE WHEN       b.period_status IS NULL OR b.period_status = 'partial_missing' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY ep.period_start ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS missing_periods,
       ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.period_status IS NULL OR b.period_status = 'partial_missing' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY ep.period_start ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) 
         / ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ep.period_start), 6) AS missing_period_rate,
       MAX(b.processed_at) OVER () AS last_processing_time,
       COALESCE(b.total_characters, 0) AS total_characters
  FROM expected_periods AS ep
  LEFT JOIN base AS b
    ON b.period_start   = ep.period_start
  WHERE ep.period_start <= (
          SELECT MAX(period_start)
            FROM base
       )
 ORDER BY ep.period_start DESC

datasets.name: 90da3db5
queryLines:
SELECT chars.granularity,
       chars.period_start,
       chars.period_end,
       chars.period_days,
       chars.observed_days,
       chars.is_partial_period,
       chars.period_status,
       chars.character_id,
       worlds.world_name,
       chars.account_status,
       chars.sex,
       chars.vocation,
       chars.level_start,
       chars.level,
       chars.level_delta_period,
       chars.level_delta_short,
       chars.level_delta_medium,
       chars.level_delta_long,
       chars.level_delta_xlong,
       chars.first_seen_date,
       chars.last_login_date,
       chars.days_since_last_login,
       chars.is_active_in_period,
       chars.is_active_1d,
       chars.is_active_7d,
       chars.is_active_30d,
       chars.is_active_90d,
       chars.lifecycle_stage,
       chars.lifecycle_event,
       chars.new_events,
       chars.returning_events,
       chars.dormant_events,
       chars.churned_events,
       chars.in_guild,
       chars.owns_house,
       chars.is_married,
       chars.loyalty_title,
       chars.achievement_points,
       chars.processed_at
  FROM tibia_analytics.gold.characters_behavior_periodic AS chars
 INNER JOIN tibia_analytics.gold.worlds AS worlds
    ON worlds.world_id = chars.world_id
 WHERE chars.granularity = :p_granularity
   AND chars.period_start BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, worlds.world_name))
   AND (:p_character_id = 'All' 
         OR chars.character_id = :p_character_id)
 ORDER BY chars.period_start DESC,
          worlds.world_name,
          chars.level DESC

datasets.name: b5b101cd
queryLines:
SELECT chars.snapshot_date,
       chars.character_id,
       worlds.world_name,
       chars.account_status,
       chars.sex,
       chars.vocation,
       chars.level,
       chars.level_delta_1d,
       chars.level_delta_7d,
       chars.level_delta_30d,
       chars.level_delta_90d,
       chars.first_seen_date,
       chars.last_login_date,
       chars.days_since_last_login,
       chars.is_active_1d,
       chars.is_active_7d,
       chars.is_active_30d,
       chars.is_active_90d,
       chars.lifecycle_stage,
       chars.lifecycle_event,
       chars.in_guild,
       chars.owns_house,
       chars.is_married,
       chars.loyalty_title,
       chars.achievement_points,
       chars.processed_at
  FROM tibia_analytics.gold.characters_behavior_daily AS chars
 INNER JOIN tibia_analytics.gold.worlds AS worlds
    ON worlds.world_id = chars.world_id
 WHERE chars.snapshot_date BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
   AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, 'All')
         OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:p_world_name, worlds.world_name))
   AND (:p_character_id = 'All' 
         OR chars.character_id = :p_character_id)
 ORDER BY chars.snapshot_date DESC,
          worlds.world_name,
          chars.level DESC

queryLines:

       CASE 
         WHEN is_married = TRUE  THEN 'Yes'

       END AS is_married

datasets.name: ccc6e67d
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT
       loyalty_title
  FROM tibia_analytics.gold.characters_behavior_periodic
 ORDER BY CASE
            WHEN loyalty_title = 'Not Informed'         THEN 0 
            WHEN loyalty_title = 'No Loyalty Title'     THEN 1
            WHEN loyalty_title = 'Scout of Tibia'       THEN 2
            WHEN loyalty_title = 'Sentinel of Tibia'    THEN 3
            WHEN loyalty_title = 'Steward of Tibia'     THEN 4
            WHEN loyalty_title = 'Warden of Tibia'      THEN 5
            WHEN loyalty_title = 'Squire of Tibia'      THEN 6
            WHEN loyalty_title = 'Warrior of Tibia'     THEN 7
            WHEN loyalty_title = 'Keeper of Tibia'      THEN 8
            WHEN loyalty_title = 'Guardian of Tibia'    THEN 9
            WHEN loyalty_title = 'Sage of Tibia'        THEN 10
            WHEN loyalty_title = 'Savant of Tibia'      THEN 11
            WHEN loyalty_title = 'Enlightened of Tibia' THEN 12
            ELSE 13
          END, 
          loyalty_title

datasets.name: a45e36dc
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT
       granularity
  FROM tibia_analytics.gold.characters_behavior_periodic
 ORDER BY CASE
            WHEN granularity = 'Day'     THEN 0
            WHEN granularity = 'Week'    THEN 1
            WHEN granularity = 'Month'   THEN 2
            WHEN granularity = 'Quarter' THEN 3
          END,
          granularity

datasets.name: 0d0d6a52
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT
       character_id
  FROM tibia_analytics.gold.characters_behavior_periodic
 ORDER BY character_id

datasets.name: ef723f81
queryLines:
SELECT 'account_status' AS cohort_dimension
 UNION ALL
SELECT 'vocation'
 UNION ALL
SELECT 'world'
 UNION ALL
SELECT 'in_guild'
 UNION ALL
SELECT 'owns_house'
 UNION ALL
SELECT 'is_married'

lines: This page provides a high-level overview of the current health of the Tibia community. It summarizes character activity, growth dynamics, engagement, and global progression across all active worlds.

frame.title: OBSERVED CHARACTERS
frame.description: Distinct characters observed during the selected period.

frame.title: ACTIVITY RATE 30D
frame.description: Share of observed characters active within the last 30 days.

frame.title: RETENTION RATE 7D
frame.description: Share of characters retained from the previous period.

frame.title: NET CHARACTER GROWTH
frame.description: New + Returning characters minus Churned characters.

frame.title: CHARACTER LIFECYCLE COMPOSITION
frame.description: Changes in lifecycle distribution help reveal shifts in engagement, inactivity and churn.

frame.title: COMMUNITY SIZE, ACTIVITY AND RETENTION
frame.description: Character growth is more sustainable when activity and retention remain stable or improve.

frame.title: CHARACTER GROWTH AND CHURN
frame.description: Net growth reflects the balance between character acquisition and churn.

lines: This page analyzes how characters move through the community lifecycle over time. It highlights acquisition, reactivation, dormancy, churn, and the overall balance between character inflows and outflows.

frame.title: NEW EVENT RATE
frame.description: Characters newly observed this period.

frame.title: RETURNING EVENT RATE
frame.description: Inactive characters becoming active again.

frame.title: CHURNED EVENT RATE
frame.description: Characters transitioning into churn.

frame.title: COMMUNITY LIFECYCLE COMPOSITION
frame.description: Shifts toward dormant and churned characters may indicate weakening engagement.

frame.title: LIFECYCLE EVENT COMPOSITION
frame.description: Highlights which lifecycle transitions are driving community change.

frame.title: NET CHARACTER GROWTH
frame.description: Positive growth occurs when inflows exceed churn.

frame.title: REPLACEMENT RATE
frame.description: New and returning characters per churned character.

frame.title: CHARACTER REPLACEMENT RATE
frame.description: Values above 100% indicate inflows exceed churn.

frame.title: CHARACTER ACQUISITION AND REACTIVATION
frame.description: Higher rates indicate stronger community inflows.

frame.title: DORMANCY AND CHURN TRENDS
frame.description: Rising churn relative to dormancy may indicate accelerating character loss.

lines: This page explores character engagement through activity rates, progression trends, and participation patterns, providing a view of how activity differs across the overall population and its most active segments.

frame.title: Activity Rate 7d
frame.description: Characters active within the last 7 days.

frame.title: Activity Rate 30d
frame.description: Characters active within the last 30 days.

frame.title: Activity Rate 90d
frame.description: Characters active within the last 90 days.

frame.title: DAU/MAU Stickiness
frame.description: Share of monthly active characters active daily.

frame.title: WAU/MAU Stickiness
frame.description: Share of monthly active characters active weekly.

frame.title: CHARACTER ACTIVITY TRENDS
frame.description: A widening gap between 30d and 7d activity may signal weakening engagement.

frame.title: CHARACTER STICKINESS TRENDS
frame.description: Higher stickiness indicates characters return more frequently.

frame.title: AVERAGE PROGRESSION GROWTH
frame.description: Sustained growth suggests continued character investment and activity.

frame.title: AVERAGE PROGRESSION GROWTH (ACTIVE CHARACTERS)
frame.description: Focuses on progression among characters who remain actively engaged.

frame.title: COMMUNITY PROGRESSION PROFILE
frame.description: Tracks overall progression and achievement accumulation across the community.

frame.title: COMMUNITY PROGRESSION PROFILE (ACTIVE CHARACTERS)
frame.description: Highlights progression patterns among actively engaged characters.

frame.title: LOYALTY TITLE DISTRIBUTION
frame.description: Reveals how long-term commitment is distributed across the community.

lines: This page analyzes how effectively the community retains characters over time. It tracks character persistence, churn dynamics, and long-term retention patterns across successive cohorts.

frame.title: COHORT RETENTION HEATMAP
frame.description: Reveals how retention evolves across different character cohorts.

frame.title: COHORT RETENTION CURVES
frame.description: Compares retention decay patterns across cohorts over time.

frame.title: RETENTION RATE 30D
frame.description: Active characters retained after 30 days.

frame.title: RETENTION RATE 90D
frame.description: Active characters retained after 90 days.

frame.title: CHURN RATE 30D
frame.description: Active characters lost within 30 days.

frame.title: CHURN RATE 90D
frame.description: Active characters lost within 90 days.

frame.title: RETENTION TRENDS
frame.description: Higher retention indicates characters continue returning over time.

frame.title: CHURN TRENDS
frame.description: Rising churn may signal weakening long-term engagement.

lines: Characters are grouped by the period in which they first entered the dataset. Retention shows the share of those characters that remained active in subsequent periods.

This page evaluates the long-term sustainability of the Tibia community. It combines growth, retention, churn, replacement, and activity indicators to assess whether the character base is expanding, stabilizing, or declining over time.

frame.title: GROWTH RATE
frame.description: Net character growth relative to community size.

frame.title: RETENTION RATE 90D
frame.description: Active characters retained after 90 days.

frame.title: CHURN RATE 90D
frame.description: Characters lost after prolonged inactivity.

frame.title: COMMUNITY GROWTH TRENDS
frame.description: Sustainable growth requires both increasing population and positive growth rates.

frame.title: LONG-TERM RETENTION AND CHURN
frame.description: Retention consistently above churn supports long-term community stability.

frame.title: REPLACEMENT RATE
frame.description: New and returning characters per churned character.

frame.title: ACTIVITY AND REPLACEMENT DYNAMICS
frame.description: Replacement above 100% helps offset character losses and sustain activity levels.

lines: This page monitors the data quality and reliability of the analytics pipeline. It tracks data coverage, completeness, processing consistency, and ingestion volume across periods to ensure the integrity of downstream analyses.

frame.title: COVERAGE
frame.description: Share of expected days successfully observed in the dataset.

frame.title: LAST PROCESSING TIME
frame.description: Most recent successful data processing timestamp.

frame.title: MISSING PERIODS RATE
frame.description: Proportion of periods with incomplete or missing data.

frame.title: DATA COVERAGE OVER TIME
frame.description: Coverage below 100% indicates incomplete ingestion for the period.

frame.title: TOTAL CHARACTERS
frame.description: Number of unique characters captured per period.
Rising missing period rate signals instability in the pipeline.
frame.title: MISSING DATA TREND

frame.description: Stable character counts indicate consistent ingestion and source reliability.
frame.title: DATA VOLUME STABILITY
PERIODIC DATA SNAPSHOT
frame.description: Raw periodic character-level dataset used for aggregated analytics and lifecycle analysis.

frame.title: DAILY DATA SNAPSHOT
frame.description: Raw daily character-level dataset used as input for longitudinal transformations.

lines: **Note**: This page is designed for data quality monitoring and is not affected by community segmentation filters. Date Range applies to all visuals. Granularity controls the KPIs, charts, and the Periodic Audit table. Character ID can be used to inspect individual records in both audit tables. The Daily Audit table always shows daily data and is not affected by Granularity.
